Author: rail
Name: AetherDraw
Punchline: A realtime multi-user whiteboard raid planner and strat viewer. Compatible with https://aetherdraw.me
Description: Whiteboard raid planner for encounters. Use /aetherdraw to open. Searchable database of community plans, supports realtime multi-user, multi-platform collaboration. Also available at https://aetherdraw.me to live sync with plugin users or when plugins unavailable
Changelog:
v2.4.6.0:api bump, criterion support
v2.4.5.0: arena background, job icons expanded.
v2.4.4.2: API 14, 7.4
